curation_notes: Primary locations derived from the patch diff. The getAllEventNames function in svg-loader.js enumerates DOM events by iterating document.body properties but misses SVG animation events (onbegin, onend, onrepeat) and non-standard events (onfocusin, onfocusout, onbounce, onfinish, onshow). The renderBody function checks href and xlink:href attributes for javascript: URLs but misses the values attribute. Both locations are in the same file. No sibling files contain the same vulnerability pattern — the lib/ directory modules (counter.js, css-url-fixer.js, scope-css.js) handle unrelated functionality. Pre-assigned vuln_class xss is correct: CWE-79 maps directly to XSS, the advisory explicitly describes XSS, and the patch addresses incomplete event attribute sanitization.
